first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications. The evaluation remains focused on the same key skill gaps (C++, industrial automation, specific security standards) in both versions.
